name: normalized-100m
status: LIVE — this is the genesis distribution; total == TangleToken.MAX_SUPPLY (100M) => true fixed supply
description: Raw snapshot normalized DOWN to a round 100,000,000 TNT by reducing ONLY the Treasury bucket. Claimant buckets (substrate/evm/foundation) are byte-identical to raw-snapshot.json.

derivation.note: reduction == raw total (109255636.92) - 100000000 exactly; no claimant is affected

inflation.note: 1% of 100M, treasury-funded via InflationPool.fund() (not minted); ~32.6M treasury sustains a flat 1% for ~32yr

pending: substrate/evm/foundation are CURRENT ESTIMATES pending the canonical mainnet snapshot regen. On regen, recompute treasury = 100M - (final substrate+evm+foundation). The 100M total and MAX_SUPPLY are FIXED; Treasury is the balancing bucket. Then mirror into base-mainnet.json migration.* + carveouts and set migration.deploy=true.
